channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI UI tools: what they fix and what they break
item.description: Cut frontend boilerplate 83% with AI UI tools in 2026 — the real wins and the hidden traps most teams miss. Includes version-pinned tools, accessibility audits, and a worked Next.js example.

item.title: gRPC vs REST vs tRPC: Latency and cost in 2026
item.description: Pick one protocol: REST, gRPC or tRPC in 2026 for 60% lower latency or 40% cheaper bills. Real benchmarks on AWS m5.large and mobile in Singapore.

item.title: $5k remote roles: Nairobi-Lagos playbook
item.description: Land $5k remote roles with three artifacts: a live demo, runbook, and postmortem. Proven playbook from Nairobi and Lagos engineers in 2026.

item.title: HTMX: 5 things I gave up to run it in prod
item.description: Cut local setup from 12 minutes to 45 seconds with HTMX — setup time, error rates, and the exact tools I swapped out in 2026

item.title: WCAG chat fails: the 4 silent ARIA traps
item.description: WCAG chat fails: cut silent ARIA bugs 90% with assertive live regions, atomic updates, and cross-engine fixes tested on VoiceOver, NVDA, and TalkBack in 2026.

item.title: 3 AI pair-programming tools we dropped after 60 days
item.description: Discover how a team cut nitpick comments 68% with AI pair programming. Real metrics from 60 days of testing GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Amazon Q and more — plus the exact commands to onboard in 30 minutes.

item.title: AI prompt injection: why most systems fail
item.description: Cut prompt-injection leakage to zero with 35 ms overhead — learn the real attack vectors LangChain docs ignore and the tools that actually work in 2026.

item.title: Human-in-the-loop vs full auto: AI agents in 2026
item.description: Cut AI agent incidents 80% with human review — latency benchmarks, cost breakdowns, and the hybrid setup most teams miss in 2026.

item.title: Split the monolith slowly — no rewrite needed
item.description: Cut migration risk 60% with incremental monolith splitting — strangler facade, gradual traffic routing, and when to avoid dual writes in 2026

item.title: Free-threaded Python 3.13: CPU-bound web wins
item.description: Cut Python 3.13 free-threaded web app latency 62% — real benchmarks, cost savings, and the GIL change that actually matters in production

item.title: Survive AI: 3 skills that beat automation
item.description: Protect your $95k salary: three skills AI can’t automate yet — system design, debugging, and performance tuning — with benchmarks and the mistakes I made.

item.title: Service mesh in 2026: what we got wrong
item.description: Service mesh in 2026 costs 18 ms latency and 22% memory overhead — real production data from payments, healthcare, and e-commerce systems

item.title: 5 experimentation platforms I wish I’d tested sooner
item.description: Cut experiment costs 60% with Statsig — one SDK, offline sync, and stats that work on $20 KaiOS phones

item.title: Sigstore + SLSA: why repos will break in 2026
item.description: Sigstore + SLSA cut tamper detection from 12 hours to 2 minutes and saved $8k in SLA credits. Here’s the exact 2026 setup we use at 6 engineers.

item.title: Store audit logs where latency can’t hide
item.description: Cut 90% storage and halve latency for audit logs — PostgreSQL 16 vs ClickHouse 25.1 under 1M writes/s with real benchmarks and cost data

item.title: Tool calls under load: async batch vs fire-and-forget
item.description: Cut cloud costs 60% with async batch tool calls — real P99 latency, Redis 7.2 cost, and the fire-and-forget trap most teams hit at scale.

item.title: Pick the right LLM in 500ms or less
item.description: Cut LLM token spend 34% without raising latency with a 200 ms router. Learn the exact model scoring weights, canary tricks, and Redis 7.2 tricks that saved $2,340/month in production.

item.title: AI static analysis vs legacy SAST: 5x faster scans
item.description: Cut vulnerability remediation time 78% with AI static analysis — CodeQL AI vs Semgrep 1.55 in real CI/CD pipelines with SOC 2 compliance data for 2026.

item.title: Pick the right broker: Kafka vs Redpanda vs NATS in
item.description: Cut event broker latency 85% in 2026 — Kafka vs Redpanda vs NATS benchmark with exact configs, AWS costs, and the one tuning mistake 90% of teams make.

item.title: AI agents lose context after restart: how to fix
item.description: AI agents forget context after restart — 3 concrete fixes for session persistence in 2026. Includes LangChain 0.2, Redis 7.2, and Kubernetes race fixes with exact latency and cost numbers.
